questions.text: When was the last time you genuinely felt 'in the zone' or lost track of time doing something — not work, not volleyball, just something where you got completely absorbed? What was the activity?
If you had to describe your ideal morning routine in 3 words — not what you do now, but what would make you feel most ready for the day. What are those 3 words and why?
What's your 'comfort movie' or show — the one you can watch over and over when you're sick, tired, or just need something familiar? Do you have one, or are you always chasing something new?

Do you consider yourself spiritual or have any specific practices or beliefs that help you make sense of life — things like meditation, journaling, philosophy, religion, or just a personal framework for understanding the world?

When you think about giving back or contributing to the world beyond your immediate circle — is that something you want to make time for? Do you have causes you care about, prefer volunteering time over money, or tend to focus your impact locally versus globally?
